description: Critical smoke tests for loci-preflight. Validates only invoke / no-invoke behavior and required preflight structure. Designed for cheap, deterministic grading.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: /plan Implement a guard in ClockP_construct in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c so it returns NULL immediately if clockFxn is NULL, before any timer setup occurs.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block appears before any implementation plan or code and includes all required sections: Call graph, Latency, Arithmetic, Resources, and Execution fit.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'Implement' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: /plan How should I modify ClockP_stop in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c so it returns immediately without calling the FreeRTOS timer API if the clock was never started?
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required sections appears before the modification plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'How should I modify' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: Required preflight section

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: Add a per-connection packet counter inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that increments a uint32_t in the connection record on every successful send.
evals.expected_output: A direct implementation response with no preflight block. The skill is not invoked because the user is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix was given.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Explain what ClockP_start does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockP_freertos.c and when the timer becomes active. Do not propose changes.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no preflight block. No code change is intended.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode and no code change is intended — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Describe what GAPBondMgr_Init does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c and what each parameter controls.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no preflight block. No code change is intended.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode and no code change is intended — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Review HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c for potential issues. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.expected_output: A code review with observations and no preflight block - 'don't change anything yet' is explicit analysis mode.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode — explicit analysis mode, no code change planned — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: /plan Write a bounds guard at the top of Connection_getConnIndex in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c that returns -1 immediately if the connection handle is greater than or equal to MAX_NUM_BLE_CONNS, so callers never index out of bounds on the connection table. The function is compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required sections appears before the implementation plan, covering the array index arithmetic and call graph for Connection_getConnIndex.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: /plan + 'Write a bounds guard' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Arithmetic:' line
assertions.description: Index bounds check is an arithmetic range concern — must appear in preflight

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: /plan Add a retry loop inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that retries up to 3 times if the connection handle lookup returns invalid, doubling the backoff interval on each attempt up to a cap of 500ms. The function is compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block covering arithmetic (overflow risk on doubling the backoff interval) and call graph for HCI_SendDataPkt, before the implementation plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: /plan + 'Add a retry loop' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Arithmetic:' line
assertions.description: Doubling a backoff interval is a classic overflow/range risk — must appear in preflight

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use an allowed value

evals.prompt: Implement a one-entry cache for GAPBondMgr_FindAddr in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c that stores the last resolved address in a static variable and skips the NV lookup on repeated calls with the same address. The function is compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A direct implementation response with no preflight block. The skill is not invoked because the user is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix was given.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix — 'Implement' alone must not trigger the skill

evals.prompt: Add a call to Connection_getConnIndex at the start of the BLE connection event handler in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c to validate the handle before processing the event. The function is compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
evals.expected_output: A direct implementation response with no preflight block. The skill is not invoked because the user is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix was given.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: User is not in plan mode — no /plan prefix — 'Add a call to' without plan mode must not trigger the skill
